name: Guacamole
recipeIngredient: 2 each Ripe avocados, halved and pitted
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the metal chopping blade in your food processor.
2. Add the onion, lemon juice, mayonnaise, chili peppers, and salt to the work bowl.
3. Run the processor continuously for 10 seconds until the onion is finely minced and the other ingredients are well blended.
4. Scoop large chunks of avocado into the work bowl using a tablespoon.
5. Clean out each avocado shell thoroughly.
6. Add the avocado chunks around the chopping blade of the food processor.
7. Pulse the processor two or three times, until the mixture is churned but still lumpy (like cottage cheese).
